title: PARENT TRAINING AND INFORMATION - 211info
text: NORTHWEST PARENTING PARENT TRAINING AND INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers parenting education programs, workshops, child development classes, support groups, parent–child activity groups, educational materials, and specialized information and referral. Divorce, custody, and court-approved classes are available on the website. 5825 NE Ray Circle Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 614-3188 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 614-3188 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, and Tillamook Counties Services: Child Development Classes Community Calendars * Parenting Issues Court Ordered Parenting Programs Parent Support Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Materials Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST PARENTING
